name: Fujifilm Instax Square Link Smartphone Printer
description: Designed for use with INSTAX SQUARE instant film, INSTAX SQUARE LINK Smartphone Printer connects to your smartphone via Bluetooth4.2 and works with the free INSTAX SQUARE LINK app to create 2.44 x 2.44" prints from still images or videos.

features.Key Features:: For Use with INSTAX SQUARE Instant Film | Print from the INSTAX SQUARE LINK App | Prints 2.44 x 2.44" Photos | Add Augmented Reality Effects to Photos | Add Frames/Sketches/Stickers to Photos | Over 1600 In-App Stickers | Print Photos from Videos | Print up to 100 Images on a Full Charge | Bluetooth 4.2 Connectivity | Rechargeable Battery via USB-C
features.What's In The Box?: FUJIFILM INSTAX SQUARE LINK Smartphone Printer | USB-C Cable
